title: Trachypteris aureonitens

The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, offering various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory infections.
